name: Peanut Butter & Jelly Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together butter (or margarine), shortening, peanut butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Blend in the egg, flour mixture, baking soda, baking powder, and salt until smooth.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the dough to firm up.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Shape the chilled dough into 3/4-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on a lightly greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set but not hard.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before transferring cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Once cooled, sandwich the cookies together with jelly or jam.
Total: Approximately 4 1/2 dozen cookies.
